culture.notes: A gift envelope with money, common during Spring Festival and weddings.

culture.pinyin: Yi ban bu xu yao gei xiao fei.
culture.notes: Tipping is uncommon in most restaurants, taxis, and hotels in mainland China.
At formal meals, people may toast repeatedly. It is acceptable to drink tea or say you do not drink alcohol.

culture.pinyin: Qing bang wo jiao jiu hu che.
culture.notes: Use this sentence when you need an ambulance. Emergency number: 120.
